chunks.text: BEARS 2023: Registration - EECS at Berkeley BEARS 2023: Registration Register to attend on Eventbrite Registration is required. Admission is free for UC Berkeley affiliates. Sales end on Feb 9, 2023. Accessibility If you require an accommodation for effective communication (ASL interpreting/CART captioning, alternative media formats, etc.) or information about campus mobility access features in order to fully participate in this event, please contact us at xrg@eecs.berkeley.edu with as much advance notice as possible and at least 7-10 days in advance of the event. < Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) 2023 BEARS 2023: Schedule > View Open Faculty Positions
